TITLE: Run directory canonical root
DESCRIPTION: Align Switching run directory allocation with a single globally enforced canonical run root for the repository, independent of per-module path conventions.
NOTES_OR_CONSTRAINTS: Switching module remediation only. Addresses PATH category: run_dir under results/Switching/runs vs globally enforced root.

TITLE: Failure path canonicalization
DESCRIPTION: Make failure paths follow the same manifest, fingerprint, and run_dir contract as the primary success path (early failure before run_dir is set).
NOTES_OR_CONSTRAINTS: Addresses FAILURE category: switching_canonical_failure / run_failure_* without full manifest lifecycle (BS-05).

TITLE: External data contract (formalization only)
DESCRIPTION: Define a formal contract for external raw data: defined data root, deterministic resolution rule, stable identity (version or location). No ingestion of raw data into the repository.
NOTES_OR_CONSTRAINTS: Formalization only. Intentional anti-bloat policy preserved (BS-04).

TITLE: Signaling contract clarification
DESCRIPTION: Clarify final-state semantics for execution signaling (e.g. execution_status.csv multi-write: last write wins; mid-run copies non-final).
NOTES_OR_CONSTRAINTS: Contract clarification for operators and automation. Does not expand to new signal types or parallel infrastructure.

TITLE: Scientific logic
DESCRIPTION: Any change to physics, observables, algorithms, or numerical interpretation in Switching.
NOTES_OR_CONSTRAINTS: Not listed as non-canonical in Phase 3 closure.

TITLE: Pipeline redesign
DESCRIPTION: Restructuring the analysis pipeline, new stages, or replacement of the verified execution chain.
NOTES_OR_CONSTRAINTS: Phase 3 verified chain is frozen for scope purposes.

TITLE: Performance changes
DESCRIPTION: Speedups, parallelization, batching, or resource optimization.

TITLE: Refactoring
DESCRIPTION: Code style rewrites, general cleanup, or reorganization not required to fix the four Phase 3 items.
NOTES_OR_CONSTRAINTS: Scope is remediation of documented gaps only.

TITLE: Caching
DESCRIPTION: Introduction or change of caches for inputs, outputs, or intermediate results.

TITLE: Data relocation into repository
DESCRIPTION: Moving or copying external raw data into the repo for Switching.
PHASE3_SOURCE: Phase 3 (C) explicit: REQUIRES_PHASE4_FIX formalization NOT relocation
NOTES_OR_CONSTRAINTS: Violates intentional policy stated in Phase 3.

TITLE: Undocumented issues
DESCRIPTION: Any problem not explicitly recorded in Phase 3 closure artifacts.
NOTES_OR_CONSTRAINTS: Requires a new planning phase; not Phase 4.
